title: Bauer Thermal Brush/Multi-Styler Hot Brush with Ionic Technology to Smooth and Shine / 38mm Barrel to Curl, Straighten and Detangle 38809
features: IONIC THERMAL HAIR BRUSH - This thermal brush helps you to achieve shinier, healthier-looking hair with every use. It utilises advanced ionic technology to lock in moisture, reduce frizz, and smooth the hair cuticle - perfect for everyday styling.

3 IN 1 STYLING TOOL - Straighten, curl, and detangle with one versatile tool. Whether you’re looking for sleek locks, soft waves, or a polished blowout finish, this thermal brush combines multiple functions into one simple solution.

ROUND BARREL WITH FINE BRISTLES - The 38mm diameter heating barrel is ideal for creating medium to loose curls, while the fine bristles help detangle and smooth your hair as you style. The cool tip ensures safe handling, especially when styling closer to the scalp.

TRAVEL-READY DESIGN - Equipped with a 360° anti-tangle swivel cord and a hanging loop for easy storage, this brush is built for convenience. The dual voltage (110–240V) and compact design make it a perfect choice for styling at home or abroad.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Previous page Style Your Way Have control over your style with a product that helps create straight, wavy, or curly hair. 38mm Round Barrel Ideal for creating medium to loose curls. Fine Bristles Help detangle and smooth your hair as you style. Ionic Technology Helps lock in moisture while reducing heat damage and frizz. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Do not use while bathing or near water. Keep the power plug and cord away from heated surfaces. Always unplug when not in use. Allow the product to cool down after use. Do not use if the power cord or plug is damaged. Always follow local electrical safety guidelines when using this product internationally.
